name: Understanding Developer Pain Points in Federated Learning: Insights from Stack Overflow and GitHub
summary: arXiv:2607.19621v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training without centralizing raw data, but building and operating FL systems remains difficult...
description: arXiv:2607.19621v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training without centralizing raw data, but building and operating FL systems remains difficult due to distributed execution, rapidly evolving frameworks, and privacy and governance requirements. In this paper, we present an empirical study of FL developer challenges by independently analyzing...
author: Sahand Saed, Khairul Alam, Banani Roy
